occurrence_sentence: Scientists from the University of Birmingham have successfully tested a new technique for generating cold atoms, developed by Aquark Technologies.
The tests at University of Birmingham are the first time that Supermolasses has been independently achieved and were carried out as part of an Innovate UK funded project, Gravity Array.

interaction_phrase: collaboration between Aquark Technologies and the University of Birmingham
occurrence_sentence: Gravity Array, funded by Innovate UK (Project: 10032699), is a collaboration between Aquark Technologies and the University of Birmingham and combines the ground-breaking "supermolasses" atom cloud generation with the expertise in quantum sensing of gravity at the UK Quantum Technology Hub in Sensors and Timing.
Scientists from the University of Birmingham have successfully tested a new technique for generating cold atoms, developed by Aquark Technologies.
